title: New Falsification Target

metrics.name: required_derivation
metrics.value: from finality-domain dynamics, not post-hoc ordinal tail labels

strongest_claim: The next task is to derive or reject the cover-deletion/cubic-deletion-count weights from finality-domain dynamics.
improved: T366 converts finite success into a falsifiable derivation target.
weakened_or_falsified: It weakens more uniform counting as the next move.
falsification_condition: T366 fails if the candidate is accepted without derivation.
s1_update: S1 remains requires_added_assumption for the finite ordinal route.
claim_ledger_update: Do not update the claim ledger from T366 alone.
open_blocker: No finality-domain dynamics derive the successful finite weighting rule yet.
suggested_next: Derive or reject the candidate action from finality-domain data rather than from post-hoc tail labels.
not_claimed: These finite measure stress tests do not define a physical measure, estimate dimension, prove faithful embedding, validate random sprinkling, derive metric structure, establish a continuum limit, or settle S1.
